data.name: Common.SomethingWentWrong
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.

data.name: Flights.ExportFailedDetail
data.value: The export could not be generated. Please try again.

data.name: Flights.WorkOrderDownloadReadyDetail
data.value: The approved work order has been downloaded.

data.name: Flights.WorkOrderDownloadFailedDetail
data.value: The approved work order could not be generated. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.SignInSubtitle
data.value: Use your portal account to continue.

data.name: Auth.InvalidCredentials
data.value: The email or password is incorrect.

data.name: Auth.AccountLocked
data.value: The account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.

data.name: Auth.MfaSubtitle
data.value: Enter an authenticator code or a recovery code to finish signing in.

data.name: Auth.InvalidMfaCode
data.value: The verification code is not valid.

data.name: Auth.ForgotPasswordSubtitle
data.value: Enter your email and we will send reset instructions if the account exists.

data.name: Auth.ForgotPasswordSuccess
data.value: If that account exists, a reset link has been sent.

data.name: Auth.ResetPasswordSubtitle
data.value: Use the reset link from your email to set a new password.

data.name: Auth.ResetPasswordSuccess
data.value: Your password has been reset. You can sign in now.

data.name: Auth.ResetPasswordInvalidLink
data.value: The reset link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Auth.ConfirmEmailChangeSubtitle
data.value: Confirm the new sign-in email for your portal account.

data.name: Auth.ConfirmEmailChangeSuccess
data.value: Your email address has been confirmed. You can sign in with the new address.

data.name: Auth.ConfirmEmailChangeInvalidLink
data.value: The email confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Auth.ActivateSubtitle
data.value: Set a password to finish setting up your account.

data.name: Auth.ActivationSuccess
data.value: Your account is active. You can sign in now.

data.name: Auth.BrandSubtext
data.value: Manage your people, roles, and access in one secure portal.

data.name: Audit.Description
data.value: Permanent, append-only history of business and security changes.

data.name: Audit.NoChanges
data.value: No field-level changes were recorded for this entry.

data.name: Audit.HistoryDescription
data.value: Changes made to this user account.

data.name: Audit.ActivityDescription
data.value: Actions performed by this user across the system.

data.name: Audit.HistoryEmpty
data.value: No changes have been recorded for this user account yet.

data.name: Audit.ActivityEmpty
data.value: No actions have been recorded for this user yet.

data.name: Dashboard.Description
data.value: A live view of flights, work orders, and master data within your access scope.

data.name: Dashboard.MasterDataDescription
data.value: Active records powering planning and daily operations.

data.name: Dashboard.OperationsDescription
data.value: Current status across every flight visible in your scope.

data.name: Dashboard.FlightMixDescription
data.value: All visible flights by current status.

data.name: Dashboard.LiveBoardDescription
data.value: Scheduled and in-progress flights in the next 48 hours.

data.name: Dashboard.NoActiveFlights
data.value: No scheduled or in-progress flights in this window.

data.name: Dashboard.WorkOrdersDescription
data.value: Live workload and approval progress across the work orders you can access.

data.name: Dashboard.RecentActivityDescription
data.value: Newest lifecycle changes in your scope.

data.name: Dashboard.NoRecentWorkOrders
data.value: No work orders have been created yet.

data.name: Dashboard.PartialDataWarning
data.value: Some live data could not be refreshed. The last successful values are still shown.

data.name: Dashboard.AccountHomeDescription
data.value: Your role does not include operational or master-data dashboards. You can still manage your profile and account security.

data.name: Account.PasswordChanged
data.value: Your password has been changed. Please sign in again.

data.name: Account.SessionsDescription
data.value: Devices currently signed in with your account.

data.name: Account.MfaRequiredHint
data.value: This account must enroll MFA to meet administrator security requirements.

data.name: Account.MfaOptionalHint
data.value: Add an authenticator app to protect this account.

data.name: Account.MfaEnabledHint
data.value: MFA is enabled. Sign-in now requires an authenticator or recovery code.

data.name: Account.MfaEnrollmentHint
data.value: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, or enter the setup key manually, then confirm with the current code.

data.name: Account.MfaScanHint
data.value: Use Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP app.

data.name: Account.MfaManualHint
data.value: Use this key only if you cannot scan the QR code.

data.name: Account.ConfirmDisableMfa
data.value: Turn off MFA for this account? Future sign-ins will only require the password.

data.name: Account.RecoveryCodesHint
data.value: Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app.

data.name: Users.Description
data.value: Invite, edit, and manage portal accounts.

data.name: Users.InviteIntro
data.value: Send an invitation so this person can set up their portal account.

data.name: Users.InviteAdminNote
data.value: Direct user creation invites a System Administrator. Station staff and customer contacts are invited from their own records.

data.name: Users.NoAdminRoles
data.value: No System Administrator role is available.

data.name: Users.NoCompatibleRoles
data.value: No compatible role is available for this account type.

data.name: Users.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this user? They will be signed out of all sessions.

data.name: Users.ConfirmLock
data.value: Lock this user out of signing in?

data.name: Users.ConfirmSuspend
data.value: Suspend this user? They will lose access until restored.

data.name: Users.ConfirmResetMfa
data.value: Reset MFA for this user? Active sessions will be revoked and they must enroll again.

data.name: Users.StatusActiveDesc
data.value: This account is active and can access all assigned resources.

data.name: Users.StatusInvitedDesc
data.value: This account has been invited and is awaiting activation.

data.name: Users.StatusSuspendedDesc
data.value: This account is suspended and cannot sign in until access is restored.

data.name: Users.StatusDeactivatedDesc
data.value: This account is deactivated and cannot sign in.

data.name: Users.StatusLockedDesc
data.value: This account is temporarily locked out of signing in.

data.name: Roles.Description
data.value: Define roles and the permissions they grant.

data.name: Roles.FormIntro
data.value: Name the role and choose which account type it applies to.

data.name: Roles.PermissionsDescription
data.value: Select the permissions this role grants.

data.name: Roles.ReferenceOptionsHint
data.value: Flight forms need reference lookups (dropdown options). Add the "view-options" permission under Reference so users of this role can load those forms.

data.name: Roles.SystemRoleLocked
data.value: System roles cannot be edited or deleted.

data.name: Roles.ConfirmDelete
data.value: Delete this role? Users must not be assigned to it.

data.name: Roles.LoadingRoleEditorHint
data.value: Preparing the role profile and compatible permission catalog.

data.name: Roles.PermissionsLoadFailed
data.value: The permission catalog could not be loaded.

data.name: Roles.NameRequired
data.value: Enter a role name to continue.

data.name: Roles.NameTooLong
data.value: Role name must be 100 characters or fewer.

data.name: Roles.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Description must be 500 characters or fewer.

data.name: Roles.AccountTypeHint
data.value: The account type controls which permissions are compatible with this role.

data.name: Roles.DetailsReadOnlyHint
data.value: Your account can manage this role's permissions but cannot rename or describe it.

data.name: Roles.ConfigurePermissionsHint
data.value: Choose the features and actions available to {0} accounts.

data.name: Roles.OwnRolePermissionsLockedHint
data.value: To prevent accidental lockout, another administrator must change this role's permissions.

data.name: Roles.PermissionsReadOnlyHint
data.value: The manage permissions capability is required to change this access grant.

data.name: Roles.PermissionChangeSecurityHint
data.value: Saving permission changes signs out active users assigned to this role so the new access takes effect immediately.

data.name: Roles.RoleOptionsHint
data.value: Role assignment and portal-access pickers also need View under Identity & access > Roles. Add it so administrators can load eligible roles.

data.name: Roles.NoCompatiblePermissionsHint
data.value: There are no permissions available for this account type.

data.name: Roles.NoPermissionResultsHint
data.value: Try a different feature, resource, or action name.

data.name: Sessions.EmptyHint
data.value: Active devices for this user will appear here once they sign in.

data.name: Countries.Description
data.value: Maintain the ISO country list used across the system.

data.name: Countries.FormIntro
data.value: Maintain the country name and its ISO code.

data.name: Countries.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this country? It will no longer be selectable.

data.name: ManpowerTypes.Description
data.value: Classify staff members by the work they perform.

data.name: ManpowerTypes.Empty
data.value: No manpower types match your filters.

data.name: ManpowerTypes.FormIntro
data.value: Name the manpower type and optionally describe it.

data.name: ManpowerTypes.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this manpower type? It will no longer be selectable.

data.name: Licenses.Description
data.value: Manage the licenses and certifications staff can hold.

data.name: Licenses.FormIntro
data.value: Define the license code, name and an optional description.

data.name: Licenses.CodeRequired
data.value: A license code is required (2-10 letters or digits).

data.name: Licenses.CodeImmutable
data.value: The code cannot be changed after creation.

data.name: Licenses.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this license? It will no longer be selectable.

data.name: Stations.Description
data.value: Manage the airport stations the operation works at.

data.name: Stations.FormIntro
data.value: Set the airport codes, name, city and country for this station.

data.name: Stations.IcaoInvalid
data.value: ICAO code must be exactly four letters.

data.name: Stations.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this station? Linked staff lose portal access.

data.name: Stations.CodesHelpText
data.value: You can confirm IATA and ICAO codes from the official airport code references.

data.name: Stations.StaffStepIntro
data.value: Add staff who will be associated with this station.

data.name: Stations.StaffLaterHint
data.value: You can add staff members later from the staff members section.

data.name: Stations.ReviewIntro
data.value: Please review the information below before creating the station.

data.name: Stations.ReviewNote
data.value: You can review and edit any step before creating the station.

data.name: Stations.NoStaffYet
data.value: No staff added. You can add staff now or later from the station page.

data.name: Stations.ReviewStaffCount
data.value: {0} staff member(s) will be created with this station.

data.name: Stations.StaffIncomplete
data.value: Each staff row needs a name, email, and manpower type.

data.name: Stations.StaffRoleRequired
data.value: Select a portal role or turn off portal access for this staff member.

data.name: Stations.StaffMembersEmpty
data.value: No staff members are assigned to this station yet.

data.name: Customers.Description
data.value: Manage the airline customers the operation serves.

data.name: Customers.FormIntro
data.value: Capture the airline codes, official contact details, address and contacts.

data.name: Customers.EditFormIntro
data.value: Update the airline codes, official contact details, and address.

data.name: Customers.IcaoInvalid
data.value: ICAO code must be exactly three letters.

data.name: Customers.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this customer? Linked contacts lose portal access.

data.name: Customers.ContactsEmpty
data.value: No contacts have been added yet.

data.name: Customers.ContactEmailRequired
data.value: A valid contact email is required.

data.name: Customers.ContactEmailDuplicate
data.value: Contact emails must be unique within the customer.

data.name: Customers.ConfirmRemoveContact
data.value: Remove this contact? Linked portal access will be deactivated.

data.name: StaffMembers.Description
data.value: Manage station staff, their manpower type, schedule and licenses.

data.name: StaffMembers.Empty
data.value: No staff members match your filters.

data.name: StaffMembers.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by employee ID, name or email

data.name: StaffMembers.EmployeeIdHint
data.value: Employee IDs are mandatory and must be unique across all staff members.

data.name: StaffMembers.ReviewIntro
data.value: Confirm the information below before creating this staff member.

data.name: StaffMembers.ReviewNote
data.value: You can return to any step and make changes before creating the staff member.

data.name: StaffMembers.FixErrors
data.value: Please fix the following errors before continuing

data.name: StaffMembers.FormIntro
data.value: Update staff member information, schedule and licenses.

data.name: StaffMembers.ScheduleHint
data.value: Select the days this staff member works.

data.name: StaffMembers.ManpowerTypeRequired
data.value: An active manpower type is required.

data.name: StaffMembers.ConfirmDeactivate
data.value: Deactivate this staff member? A linked portal account loses access.

data.name: StaffMembers.EndBeforeStart
data.value: The end date cannot precede the start date.

data.name: StaffMembers.LicenseRequired
data.value: Select a license for each assignment.

data.name: StaffMembers.LicenseNumberRequired
data.value: A license number is required for each assignment.

data.name: StaffMembers.LicenseDuplicate
data.value: A staff member cannot hold the same license twice.

data.name: StaffMembers.ActivityEmptyHint
data.value: Audit history for this staff member will appear here as actions are taken.

data.name: StaffMembers.PortalAccessManageHint
data.value: Open the linked Identity account to manage MFA, sessions, status, and role assignments.

data.name: StaffMembers.PortalAccessLinkedHint
data.value: This staff member can sign in to the portal with their linked account.

data.name: StaffMembers.PortalAccessUnlinkedHint
data.value: Grant portal access to let this staff member sign in to the portal.

data.name: StaffMembers.PortalAccessUnavailableHint
data.value: Portal access can be granted once the staff member is active.

data.name: PortalAccess.NoCompatibleRoles
data.value: No compatible role exists yet. Create one before granting access.

data.name: PortalAccess.Granted
data.value: Portal access requested. An invitation will be sent shortly.

data.name: PortalAccess.Explanation
data.value: An invited portal account will be created for this record using the selected role.

data.name: PortalAccess.GrantOnCreateHint
data.value: Send a portal invitation once this record is created.

data.name: PortalAccess.PendingLoginEmailDetail
data.value: Waiting for {0} to confirm before the linked login email changes.

data.name: Notifications.Description
data.value: Flight assignments and other updates sent to your account.

data.name: Notifications.EmptyDescription
data.value: New flight assignments will appear here.

data.name: Notifications.UnreadEmptyDescription
data.value: You've reviewed every notification in your inbox.

data.name: Notifications.LiveUnavailable
data.value: Recent notifications may be delayed. Refresh to try again.

data.name: Notifications.ArchiveAllConfirm
data.value: This clears your current inbox. Archived notifications remain in history.

data.name: Notifications.ActionFailed
data.value: The notification could not be updated. Please try again.

data.name: Errors.Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to view this.

data.name: Errors.NotFound
data.value: The requested item was not found.

data.name: Errors.LoadFailed
data.value: We couldn't load this. Please try again.

data.name: Errors.ReferenceLookupsForbidden
data.value: Your role does not include permission to load form lookups. Ask an administrator to add the "View options" reference permission to your role.
